title: DLSA Begusarai Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Various Para Legal Officer Posts
description: District Legal Services Authority (DLSA) Begusarai has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various para-legal volunteer jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the 10th Pass can grab this chance and apply for the DLSA Begusarai Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of appl...
